Class Budget

java.lang.Object
model.Budget
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Budget extends Object implements Serializable
Budget class represents a budget category with spending limit Based on the class diagram in the provided images

  • Constructor Details

    • Budget

      public Budget(String budgetId, String category, BigDecimal limit, String period)
      Constructor for creating a new budget
      Parameters:
      budgetId - Unique identifier for this budget
      category - Category of expenses this budget tracks
      limit - Maximum spending limit for this budget
      period - The time period this budget covers (e.g., "Monthly")

  • Method Details

    • getBudgetId

      public String getBudgetId()
      Gets the budget ID
      Returns:
      Budget ID

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Gets the category for this budget
      Returns:
      Category name

    • setCategory

      public void setCategory(String category)
      Sets the category for this budget
      Parameters:
      category - New category name

    • getLimit

      public BigDecimal getLimit()
      Gets the spending limit
      Returns:
      Budget limit

    • setLimit

      public void setLimit(BigDecimal limit)
      Sets the spending limit
      Parameters:
      limit - New budget limit

    • getPeriod

      public String getPeriod()
      Gets the time period
      Returns:
      Time period (e.g., "Monthly")

    • setPeriod

      public void setPeriod(String period)
      Sets the time period
      Parameters:
      period - New time period

    • compareWithActualSpending

      public boolean compareWithActualSpending(BigDecimal actualSpending)
      Compares budget with actual spending to determine if over budget
      Parameters:
      actualSpending - The actual amount spent in this category
      Returns:
      true if over budget, false otherwise

    • updateLimit

      public void updateLimit(String category, BigDecimal amount)
      Updates the budget limit for a specific category
      Parameters:
      category - Category to update
      amount - New limit amount

    • generateRecommendations

      public String[] generateRecommendations()
      Generates budget recommendations based on spending patterns
      Returns:
      Array of recommendation strings
